data.content: Planning complete for rollback behavior tests. Created 4 child knots: (1) e991 — expand rollbackBeatState unit tests (error paths, beads path, special chars), (2) 38a0 — pre-dispatch rollback edge cases (failure, reload fail, human-owned, queue/terminal states), (3) 99a8 — step-failure rollback + invariant enforcement tests (take-loop integration), (4) d164 — execution-backend rollbackIteration tests. ~22 new test cases across 4 files. No source code changes — test-only.
